creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Rodrigo N. Hernandez from comment #5)
As it was pointed there was a CVE although you won't find the details of that CVE too much. So somehow it's in between in the thin line so I just committed all the patches.

(In reply to Alex from comment #6)
I am maintaining around 53 servers all with HEAD without any problem. I think I have only one quarterly for my line manager's FreeBSD desktop as the desktop components are too much rapidly changing.
